videos.headline: Miami's Xavier Restrepo hauls in a touchdown off a tipped pass
videos.description: Miami's Cam Ward throws the ball to Xavier Restrepo, who brings in the ball for a touchdown even though it is tipped.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Miami’s Xavier Restrepo hauls in a touchdown off a tipped pass) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Ward connects with Cam McCormick for a Miami TD
videos.description: Cam Ward throws it up to Cam McCormick for a touchdown to extend Miami's lead over Duke.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Ward connects with Cam McCormick for a Miami TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Moore's amazing catch sets up a Blue Devils TD
videos.description: Jordan Moore makes a tough catch to set up Duke in the red zone, then Peyton Jones rushes for an 8-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Moore’s amazing catch sets up a Blue Devils TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Duke's Maalik Murphy finds Sahmir Hagans for a 27-yard TD
videos.description: Maalik Murphy hits a wide-open Sahmir Hagans, who scores a 27-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Duke’s Maalik Murphy finds Sahmir Hagans for a 27-yard TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Duke uses misdirection to scores a TD before the half
videos.description: Maalik Murphy uses misdirection to get the Miami defense moving, then he dumps the ball off to Peyton Jones for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Duke uses misdirection to scores a TD before the half) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Touchdown! Xavier Restrepo scores vs. Duke
videos.description: Touchdown! Xavier Restrepo scores vs. Duke

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Touchdown! Xavier Restrepo scores vs. Duke) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Elija Lofton rumbles into the end zone for a Miami TD
videos.description: Miami retakes the lead against Duke with a 2-yard rushing touchdown from Elija Lofton.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Elija Lofton rumbles into the end zone for a Miami TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Duke's Jordan Moore makes a spectacular one-handed grab
videos.description: Jordan Moore gets up and makes a one-handed snag for Duke.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Duke’s Jordan Moore makes a spectacular one-handed grab) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Ward throws for his 4th TD against Duke
videos.description: Cam Ward hits Jacolby George in stride for his fourth passing touchdown against Duke.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Ward throws for his 4th TD against Duke) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Duke's Chandler Rivers makes a leaping grab for an INT
videos.description: Cam Ward throws across his body, and Chandler Rivers makes a leaping grab for an interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Duke’s Chandler Rivers makes a leaping grab for an INT) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Xavier Restrepo's 66-yard TD is his 3rd against Duke
videos.description: Xavier Restrepo breaks a tackle and rushes into the end zone for a 66-yard touchdown to give Miami a 46-31 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Xavier Restrepo's 66-yard TD is his 3rd against Duke) 2024/11/02 ESHEET
